## Nvidia Invests Nearly $4 Billion in CoreWeave, Increasing Its Stake 18-Fold

NVDA doubling down financially on CRWV tightens the silicon-to-cloud ecosystem loop and raises revenue concentration risk in both directions — upside if CRWV scales, downside if CRWV growth disappoints and NVDA's balance sheet is exposed.

- NVDA invested approximately $4 billion in CRWV, representing an 18-fold increase in its stake.
- CRWV is described as reshaping the cloud industry.
- Deepens the strategic and financial alignment between NVDA and a key AI cloud customer.
- High classifier confidence; Motley Fool frames the move as significant for investors.
